revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Aoki Shrine]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Aoki Shrine]]
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:qq]]{{Hidden category}}[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Automatic wikipedia redirects" to "Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Talk:Aoki Shrine]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]]{{Hidden category}}[[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Aoi Ward); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:33, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/478721456 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:33, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Aoi Ward | revid=478721456 --> #REDIRECT [[Talk:Aoi-ku, Shizuoka]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:en>Immanuelle]], [[User:ja>鈴木超世志]], [[User:2404:7A84:140:1F00:3437:3F30:2CFB:5EBC]], [[User:ja>IDCM]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Aoki_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Aoki_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
